article_title: Update to Manufacturer terms and conditions for producing non-intoxicating beverages

briefs.title: BC Liquor Manufacturers Can Now Officially Produce Non-Alcoholic Beverages at Licensed Facilities
briefs.summary: The BC Liquor and Cannabis Regulation Branch (LCRB) has updated its rules to officially confirm that liquor manufacturers can use their licensed facilities to make non-alcoholic drinks — like soda, tonic, and de-alcoholized beverages — and sell or sample them on-site. The LCRB does not oversee these products, so manufacturers are responsible for meeting any other applicable food and safety rules on their own.
briefs.article_title: Update to Manufacturer terms and conditions for producing non-intoxicating beverages
